mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(outbound_id, -3) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM product_outbound WHERE outbound_id LIKE CONCAT('OUT-FG-', #{today}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_outbound ( outbound_id, product_id, lot_no, outbound_qty, outbound_date, tracking_number ) VALUES ( #{outboundId}, #{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{outboundQty}, #{outboundDate}, #{trackingNumber} )
